title: Memorandum of understanding between the UK and India on health and life sciences
body: "This memorandum of understanding (MoU) sets out an agreement between the UK and India to collaborate and share knowledge of areas of mutual interests in health and life sciences.  These areas include:   digital health medical supply resilience antimicrobial resistance (AMR) health security cyber security medicine and medical devices regulation health systems strengthening primary healthcare   A signed copy of the MoU will be uploaded to this page when it has been received.  "
